title: circaea alpina subsp. micrantha
intro: Circaea alpina subsp. micrantha, also known as Alpine Enchanter's Nightshade or Alpine Wood Sorrel, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the family Lythraceae. This plant is recognized for its medicinal properties, particularly its astringent, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties, which have been used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Circaea alpina subsp. micrantha include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate skin conditions such as eczema and acne. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used in traditional medicine to promote overall well-being and address specific health concerns.
